## Checklist

Please confirm as much as you can before opening the PR.

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm run lint` passes (use `pnpm run lint:fix` if needed)
- [ ] For UI or visual changes, verified in Storybook (`pnpm run storybook`)
- [ ] Updated README (or other docs) if documentation or the public API changed
